Autarch.name: Autarch
Autarch.equipped_with: An Autarch is equipped with: Plasma grenades.

option_groups.header: Only one Autarch per army.
One Autarch per army can be upgraded to an Exalted Autarch for +15 points.

abilities: Battle Focus

Perfected warfare: An Autarch can decide once per game to get a +1/-1 modifier to rolls during the Reinforcement phase and/or a +1/-1 modifier during the Initiative phase. The ability may be used after rolls have been made by both players.
Exalted Autarch: The Autarch may use Perfected warfare twice per game.

Avatar of Khaine.name: Avatar of Khaine
Avatar of Khaine.equipped_with: An Avatar of Khaine is equipped with: The Wailing Doom.

option_groups.header: Only one Avatar of Khaine per army.
Can not be the mandatory HQ selection.

abilities: Fearless, Greater Demon, Terrifying(-2)
Molten body: Enemy attacks reduce their AP value by -2 (to a minimum of 0). If the model loses its last Wound, it explodes like a vehicle.

Farseer.name: Farseer
Farseer.equipped_with: A Farseer is equipped with: Plasma grenades.

option_groups.header: Only one Farseer per army.
One Farseer per army can be upgraded to an Exalted Farseer for +15 points.

abilities: Battle Focus
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.
Exalted Farseer: The model can cast and deny 1 additional power per battle round.

Spiritseer.name: Spiritseer
Spiritseer.equipped_with: A Spiritseer is equipped with: Plasma grenades.

option_groups.header: For every unit of Wraithblades, Wraithguard or Wraithlord, one Spiritseer may be selected without using a HQ slot.

abilities: Battle Focus, Command squad
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and Craftsong.

Wraithseer.name: Wraithseer
Wraithseer.equipped_with: A Wraithseer is equipped with: Ghostspear.

option_groups.header: Only one Wraithseer per army.
May be equipped with one of the following

abilities: Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from the Wraithseer discipline.
Wraithbone: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).
Wraithshield: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Yncarne.name: Yncarne
Yncarne.equipped_with: A Yncarne is equipped with: The Sword of Souls.

option_groups.header: Only one Yncarne per army.
Can not be the mandatory HQ selection.

abilities: Deflect, Fearless, Greater Demon, Parry, Terrifying(-2), <Ynnari>

Inevitable death: Once per game, after a friendly unit is removed, the Yncarne can be set up immediately to that position. Set the Yncarne up within 6" of the last removed model. You have to keep at least 1" away from enemy units. This way of moving does not count as an activation and can not be used while being in an ongoing melee combat.
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Corsair Voidreavers.name: Corsair Voidreavers
Corsair Voidreavers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Plasma grenade; Shuriken rifle.

option_groups.header: Any Voidreaver may swap their Shuriken rifle
The Felarch may swap their Shuriken pistol
The Felarch may be equipped with
For every 5 models, one Voidreaver may swap their Shuriken rifle
If this unit contains 10 models, one Voidreaver may swap their Shuriken rifle

abilities: Mistshield: The model and it's attached unit gain a 5+ invulnerability save against ranged attacks.
Neuro disruptor: Roll 2D6 after a successful hit and compare it with the Leadership value of the unit. If your roll is higher, the target suffers one Mortal Wound for each point above their Ld value.
Outcasts and Pirates: This unit can't be a mandatory Troop selection.

Guardian Defenders.name: Guardian Defenders
Guardian Defenders.equipped_with: Every Guardian Defender is equipped with: Plasma grenade; Shuriken catapult.

option_groups.header: The unit may contain 1 Heavy weapon platform for every 5 Guardian Defenders.
Every Heavy weapon platform can swap their Scatter laser

abilities: Battle Focus
Crewed platform: If the last Guardian Defender is removed, all remaining Heavy weapon platforms are destroyed. They are ignored for all kinds of unit strength and moral purposes.

Rangers.name: Rangers
Rangers.equipped_with: Every Ranger is equipped with: Ranger long rifle; Shuriken pistol.

option_groups.header: For every 5 Rangers, 1 model can be equipped with

abilities: Battle Focus, Infiltrator, Move through cover, Use cover
Gloom field: Enemies that target the unit and are at least 12" away from it reduce their weapon range by 6".

Pathfinder ambush: Once an enemy unit emerges from reserve, a Ranger unit in reserve may perform an intercept. The unit is immediately deployed within 18" but at least 9" of the enemy reserve unit. The Rangers can then fire at that unit as if they had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.
Wireweave net: Once per game, after this unit used Defensive fire, the attacker suffers 1D6+1 automatic wounds and reduces their charging range by 2".

Storm Guardians.name: Storm Guardians
Storm Guardians.equipped_with: Every Storm Guardian is equipped with: Aeldari chainsword; Plasma grenade; Shuriken pistol.

option_groups.header: The unit may contain 1 Serpent shield platform for every 5 Storm Guardians.
For every 5 Guardians, 2 models can swap their Aeldari chainsword and Shuriken pistol
All remaining Guardians can swap their Aeldari chainsword

abilities: Battle Focus
Crewed platform: If the last Guardian Defender is removed, all remaining Serpent scale platforms are destroyed. They are ignored for all kinds of unit strength and moral purposes.
Serpent shield: The model and its attached unit have a 5+ invulnerability save against ranged attacks. If the unit got 2 Serpent scale platforms, the invulnerability save is improved to 4+.

Wasps.name: Wasps
Wasps.equipped_with: A Wasp is equipped with: 2 Scatter lasers.

option_groups.header: May swap each Scatter laser

abilities: Battle Focus, Deep Strike, Squadron
Jump Jet: When this model executes an Advance or Charge order, it gets +6" to its movement and the Anti-Grav rule.

Corsair Voidscarred.name: Corsair Voidscarred
Corsair Voidscarred.equipped_with: Every Voidscarred and Felarch is equipped with: Plasma grenade; Shuriken rifle.

option_groups.header: Any Voidscarred may swap their Shuriken rifle
The Felarch may swap their Shuriken pistol
The Felarch may be equipped with: +15 points Mistshield.
For every 5 models, one Voidscarred may swap their Shuriken rifle
If this unit contains 10 models, one Voidscarred may swap their Shuriken rifle
If this unit contains 10 models, one Voidscarred may swap their Shuriken rifle
If this unit contains 10 models, one Voidscarred may swap their Shuriken rifle
1 Voidscarred may be equipped with a Faolchú for +10 points.

abilities: Channeler stones: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.
Faolchú: All weapons of the unit gain +1 AP when shooting at targets that benefit from cover.
Ghosthelm: The Way Seeker ignores the first Perils of the warp attack each round.
Mistshield: The model and it's attached unit gain a 5+ invulnerability save against ranged attacks.
Neuro disruptor: Roll 2D6 after a successful hit and compare it with the Leadership value of the unit. If your roll is higher, the target suffers one Mortal Wound for each point above their Ld value.
Psyker: The Way Seeker can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. They know Smite and 1 power from either the Battle or Fate discipline.
Shade Runner Assault: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every friendly model that made it into base contact.
Sniper: A model equipped with a Ranger long rifle increases their BS by +1.

Dire Avengers.name: Dire Avengers
Dire Avengers.equipped_with: Every Dire Avenger is equipped with: Avenger shuriken catapult; Plasma grenades.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +11 points.
The Exarch can swap their Diresword and Shuriken pistol
The Exarch can be equipped with: +5 points Shimmershield.
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Shimmershield: The model and its attached unit gain a 4+ invulnerability save in melee.

Fire Dragons.name: Fire Dragons
Fire Dragons.equipped_with: Every Fire Dragon is equipped with: Dragon fusion gun.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +2 points.
The Exarch can swap their Dragon's breath flamer
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Howling Banshees.name: Howling Banshees
Howling Banshees.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Banshee blade; Shuriken pistol.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +21 points.
The Exarch can swap their Banshee blade
The Exarch can swap their Shuriken pistol and Banshee blade
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Deflect, Furious Charge, Parry, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Shadow Spectres.name: Shadow Spectres
Shadow Spectres.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Haywire grenade; Plasma grenade; Prism rifle.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +26 points.
The Exarch can swap their Prism rifle
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Deflect, Terrifying(-1), <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Ghostlight: If a unit scores two or more hits with weapons with this ability, you may resolve the hits normally or inflict a single combined attack. When combining attacks, choose one Ghostlight hit to be the primary hit. Resolve only the primary hit; for each other Ghostlight hit, the primary hit gains +1 Strength, -1 AP, +1 Damage, and AT(1), to a maximum of 10 Strength, -6 AP, 4 Damage, and AT(4).

Striking Scorpions.name: Striking Scorpions
Striking Scorpions.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Mandiblaster; Scorpion chainsword; Shuriken pistol.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +21 points.
The Exarch can swap their Scorpion chainsword and Shuriken pistol: +3 points Biting blade, +12 points Scorpion claw.
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Infiltrator, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Mandiblaster: During the model's initiave step, roll a D6. On a 4+, one enemy unit in melee suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:-2 D:1.

Warlocks.name: Warlocks
Warlocks.equipped_with: A Warlock is equipped with: Plasma grenades.

option_groups.header: For every 500 points of game size, a single Warlock may be included in the army that does not take up an Elite slot.

abilities: Battle Focus, Command squad
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and two powers from a chosen discipline.
Seer council: A Farseer gets a cumulative +1 bonus to casting and denying psychic powers for each Warlock in their unit. Accompanying Warlocks receive the same bonus for each Warlock after the first.

Wraithblades.name: Wraithblades
Wraithblades.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Ghostswords.

option_groups.header: Any model may swap their Ghostswords

abilities: Massive(1), <Wraith>
Forceshield: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities.
Wraithbone: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).

Wraithguard.name: Wraithguard
Wraithguard.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: D-scythe.

option_groups.header: All models may swap their D-scythe

abilities: Massive(1), <Wraith>
Distortion: The weapon has a -1 penalty for to wound rolls.
Strength "D": A to wound roll of 2+ always wounds a creature or penetrates a vehicle.
Wraithbone: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).

Wraithlord.name: Wraithlord
Wraithlord.equipped_with: A Wraithlord is equipped with: 2 Shuriken catapults; Wraithbone fists.

option_groups.header: May swap both Shuriken catapults
Can be equipped with Ghostglaive for +11 points.
Can be equipped with two of the following

abilities: Squadron, <Wraith>
Wraithbone: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).

Hornets.name: Hornets
Hornets.equipped_with: A Hornet is equipped with: 2 Scatter lasers.

option_groups.header: May swap each Scatter laser

abilities: Anti-Grav, Battle Focus, Deflect, Fast, Squadron

Shining Spears.name: Shining Spears
Shining Spears.equipped_with: Every Shining Spear is equipped with: Laser lance; Twin shuriken catapult.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +26 points.
The Exarch can swap their Paragon sabre
The Exarch can swap their Twin shuriken catapult
The Exarch can be equipped with: +10 points Shimmershield.
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Deflect, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Shimmershield: The model and its attached unit gain a 4+ invulnerability save in melee.

Shroud Runners.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Ranger long rifle; Scatter laser; Shuriken pistol.
abilities: Battle Focus, Use cover

Swooping Hawks.name: Swooping Hawks
Swooping Hawks.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Lasblaster; Haywire grenade; Plasma grenade.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +24 points.
The Exarch can swap their Lasblaster
The Exarch can be equipped with a Power sword for +5 points.
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Sky Dive: Once per game, at the start of their activation, the unit may use a Stand & Shoot order to be immediately re-deployed anywhere on the battlefield. They must keep a minimum distance of 6" to enemy models.

Vypers.name: Vypers
Vypers.equipped_with: A Vyper is equipped with: Scatter laser; Twin shuriken catapult.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap its Scatter laser

abilities: Anti-Grav, Battle Focus, Squadron

Warp Spiders.name: Warp Spiders
Warp Spiders.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Death spinner.

option_groups.header: One model may be upgraded to an Exarch for +29 points.
The Exarch can be equipped with a second Death spinner for +8 points.
The Exarch can additionally be equipped with Powerblades for +10 points.
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.
Shunting: The unit rolls and moves an additional 1D6 when using the Advance order. If a double 1 is rolled, the unit suffers one Mortal Wound.

Windriders.name: Windriders
Windriders.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Twin shuriken catapult.

option_groups.header: Each model may swap its Twin shuriken catapult

abilities: Battle Focus

Dark Reapers.name: Dark Reapers
Dark Reapers.equipped_with: Every Dark Reaper is equipped with: Aeldari missile launcher.

The Exarch can swap their Shuriken cannon
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Unyielding, <Aspect>
Aspect armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Falcon.name: Falcon
Falcon.equipped_with: A Falcon is equipped with: Pulse laser; Scatter laser; Twin shuriken catapult.

option_groups.header: May swap the Scatter laser
May swap the Twin shuriken catapult

abilities: Anti-Grav, Battle Focus, Deep strike
Cloudstrike: The model scatters only 1D6" when being deployed via Deep strike.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 6 infantry models.

Fire Prism.equipped_with: A Fire Prism is equipped with: Prism cannon; Twin shuriken catapult.

Night Spinner.equipped_with: A Night Spinner is equipped with: Doomweaver; Twin shuriken catapult.

weapons.abilities: Armor piercing(5+), Barrage, Indirect fire, Monofilament, Suppression

Support Weapons.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Shadow weaver; Shuriken catapult.

weapons.name: Shadow weaver
weapons.abilities: Armor piercing(5+), Explosive, Indirect fire, Monofilament, Suppression

abilities: Battle Focus
Support Weapons crew: Every instance of damage can only ever cause 1 wound loss. Attacks with the "Barrage" or "Explosive" ability cause one hit for each Wound remaining on the model.
Vibro: If more than one Vibro cannon is shooting at the same target, the weapon gets the "Decimate" ability.

Crimson Hunter.equipped_with: A Crimson Hunter is equipped with: Pulse laser; 2 Starcannons.

May swap both Starcannons
The Exarch can gain one Exarch Power.

abilities: Battle Focus, Deflect
Vector dancer: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Nightwing.equipped_with: A Nightwing is equipped with: Twin bright lance; Twin shuriken cannon.

Vector Dancer: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

Vector Dancer: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

weapons.name: Laser lance
weapons.abilities: Only for models on a Jetbike

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

weapons.name: Star lance
weapons.abilities: Only for models on a Jetbike

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

equipment.name: Aspect armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Crystal body
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness. Unique.

equipment.name: Eldar jetbike
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a twin shuriken catapult and the ability "Jet bike". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Faolchu's wings
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement and the ability "Jump pack". Additionally, it gains the "Sky Dive" ability (see Swooping Hawks). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Fire blade
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains Precision(5+) and cumulative -2 AP. Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Forcefield
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Ghosthelm
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first Perils of the warp attack of the game.

equipment.name: Heavy armor plating
equipment.desc: The model gains a 3+ save.

equipment.name: Mandiblaster
equipment.desc: During the model's initiave step, roll a D6. On a 4+, one enemy unit in melee suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:-2 D:1.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Paragon of fate
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, Wounds and Attacks. The model and its attached unit may re-roll any single die per activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Paragon of war
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength, Toughness, Wounds and Attacks. It can chose a single Exarch power. Unique.

equipment.name: Phoenix gem
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated: 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound. 
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Psychic mastery
equipment.desc: The models gains +1 to all tests for manifesting a psychic power.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Rune armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Runes of warding
equipment.desc: Add +1 to rolls to deny enemy psychic powers.

equipment.name: Shrine relic
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Spirit stones
equipment.desc: The model can manifest and deny an additional psychic power per turn.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Vaul's cuirass
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Warp jump generator
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement and the ability "Jump pack". Additionally, it gains the "Shunting" ability (see Warp Spiders). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Bladestorm
equipment.desc: The model and its unit trigger the "Shuriken" special rule on each to wound roll.

equipment.name: Burning heat
equipment.desc: Ranged weapons of the model gain an additional -1 AP against units in cover.

equipment.name: Crack shot
equipment.desc: One ranged weapon of the model gets the "Seeking" ability each round.

equipment.name: Crushing blows
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to wound or armor penetration roll in melee.

equipment.name: Defensive stance
equipment.desc: The model may use Defensive fire twice when getting charged.

equipment.name: Dragon's bite
equipment.desc: Ranged weapons of the model gain a cumulative AT(1).

equipment.name: Graceful avoidance
equipment.desc: The model and its unit got a 4+ invulnerability save against melee attacks.

equipment.name: Heartstrike
equipment.desc: Melee attacks of the model gain Deadly(5+). If the model already has the rule, increase Deadly(x+) by 1. For example Deadly(5+) becomes Deadly(4+).

equipment.name: Lightning attacks
equipment.desc: The model and its unit may consolidate 6" after winning a melee combat. If it consolidates into an enemy unit, that unit may not use Defensive Fire.

equipment.name: Piercing strike
equipment.desc: Melee attacks of the model gain Armor piercing(5+).

equipment.name: Rapid redeployment
equipment.desc: The model and its unit gain the "Hit & Run" ability.

equipment.name: Reaper's reach
equipment.desc: Ranged weapons of the model and its attached unit gain +6" range.

equipment.name: Scorpion's sting
equipment.desc: Melee attacks of the model gain Precision(5+).

equipment.name: Skyhunter
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain Anti-Air.

equipment.name: Stand firm
equipment.desc: The model and its unit gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

equipment.name: Surprise assault
equipment.desc: If the model used the "Shunting" ability this round, it may shoot one additional time with each equipped Death spinner. If the model used the "Sky dive" ability this round, it doubles their shots with a Hawk's talon or Lasblaster.

equipment.name: Crystal targeting matrix
equipment.desc: The model ignores negative to hit modifiers from equipment or abilities.

equipment.name: Ghostwalk matrix
equipment.desc: The model gains "Move through cover".

equipment.name: Holo-field
equipment.desc: Roll one die for each glancing and penetrating hit against the model. You may substitute one of the following vehicle damage results with your own roll.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deep strike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Spirit stones
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Star engines
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Fast" ability.

equipment.name: Fate Reader
equipment.desc: Any one die from either player may be re-rolled once per battle round. Unique. Ulthwé only.

equipment.name: Master of Ambush
equipment.desc: After both players assigned orders during the first battle round, remove up to one unit from your own army and re-redploy it anywhere on the table that is more than 9" away from the enemy deployment zone and units. Unique. Alaitoc only.

equipment.name: Natural Leader
equipment.desc: Select up to one friendly unit during each Command phase. All selected units gain a +1 bonus to hit rolls for their next activation. Unique. Biel-Tan only.

equipment.name: Enduring Resolve
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique. Iyanden only.

equipment.name: Wild Rider Chieftain
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack. Unique. Saim-Hann only.

equipment.name: Champion of Ynneadʸ
equipment.desc: Everytime a model dies within 6" of this model it gains one temporary wound. The wound is lost at the end of the battle round. Can only have one temporary wound at a time.

equipment.name: Hungering bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains cumulative Flurry(4). Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Mirrorgazeʸ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities. Unique.

equipment.name: Silent bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains Shield breaker(-2). Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Sorrow bladeʸ
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains +1 Strength and Decimate. Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: The Lost Shroudʸ
equipment.desc: To wound rolls against the bearer suffer a -1 penalty. (Unique)

equipment.name: Wardenʸ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Bodyguard" and "Command squad" abilities.

archetypes.name: Aspect Focus
archetypes.desc:
- <Aspect> units can be taken as Troops.
- Non-<Aspect> Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Exemplars of the Shrines
archetypes.desc: - All Exarchs must gain two Exarch powers and they are no longer unique.

archetypes.name: LIIVI
archetypes.desc:
- The army got access to a single Vindicare assassin.
- One HQ selection must be a Farseer.

archetypes.name: Windhost
archetypes.desc:
- Windriders can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

archetypes.name: Wraithhost
archetypes.desc:
- Wraithblades and Wraithguard units can be taken as Troops.
- Non-<Wraith> Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Ynnari
archetypes.desc:
- Ynnari become "Battle Brothers" for Dark Eldar.
- The army got access to the Ynnari Armory and the Revenant discipline.
- May not select any Legacy.

legacies.name: Fieldcraft
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Alaitoc Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Foresight of the Damned
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Ulthwé Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Stoic Endurance
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Iyanden Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Swordwind
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Biel-Tan Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Wild Host
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Saim-Hann Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

traits.name: Children of Khaine
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deadly(6+)" ability for all melee weapons.

traits.name: Children of Morai-Heg
traits.desc: If the unit is below starting strength, each model in it gains +1 attack.

traits.name: Children of Prophecy
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll 1s and 2s for manifestating or denying psychic powers. Only for Psykers.

traits.name: Combined War Host
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Elite Citizenry
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll one to hit roll per activation.

traits.name: Expert Crafters
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll one to wound or armor penetration roll per activation.

traits.name: Grim
traits.desc: Every melee combat result is increased by +2 for the unit.

traits.name: Hail of Doom
traits.desc: The "Shuriken" ability grants an additional -1 to the weapon's AP value.

traits.name: Masterful Shots
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Masters of Concealment
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Mobile Fighters
traits.desc: If the unit disembarked from a transport this round, all of its weapons gain the "Decimate" ability for this activation.

traits.name: Savage Blades
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, all of its melee weapons gain -1 AP for this activation.

traits.name: Students of Vaul
traits.desc: The unit ignores temporary vehicle damage on a roll of 4+.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Destructor
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target suffers four automatic hits with S:7 AP:-2 D:1, AT(1), Seeking.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Conceal
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target gains the benefit of cover.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Empower
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target receives +1 Strength and the "Decimate" ability for melee attacks.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Jinx
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target worsens its Saving throw or Armor value by -1.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Protect
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target improves its Saving throw or Armor value by +1.

Battle (Warlocks only).name: Reveal
Battle (Warlocks only).effect: The target loses the benefit of cover.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Will of Asuryan
Fate (Farseers only).effect: The unit gains the "Fearless" and "Objective secured!" abilities.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Doom
Fate (Farseers only).effect: All attacks against the target gain the "Decimate" and "Armorbane" abilities.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Eldritch Storm
Fate (Farseers only).effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: 10 AP: -2 D: 1; AT(3), Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Executioner
Fate (Farseers only).effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with S: 8 AP: -3 D: 2; AT(2), Seeking.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Fortune
Fate (Farseers only).effect: The target receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

Fate (Farseers only).name: Guide
Fate (Farseers only).effect: The target receives a +1 bonus to all hit rolls.

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Storm of Whispers
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: Every enemy model within range must make two dangerous terrain tests.

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Ancestor's Grace
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: All attacks of the target gain "Decimate" and (cumulative) "Lance(1)".

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Gaze of Ynnead
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: If the target unit consists of creatures, it suffers 1D6 automatic wounds with S: 10 AP: -3 D: 1; Seeking. Vehicles suffer 1D3 penetrating hits; AT(2), Seeking.

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Shield of Ynnead
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: The target receives a 4+ invulnerability save.

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Unbind Souls
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: Attacks against the target gain the "Precision(5+)" and "Shield breaker(-1)" abilities.

Revenant (Ynnari only).name: Word of the Phoenix
Revenant (Ynnari only).effect: The model may heal a friendly Eldar unit (excluding itself and <Wraith> units) within range for 3 wounds. Dead models may be revived. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Wraith (Wraithseer only).name: Enliven
Wraith (Wraithseer only).effect: The target gains the "Battle Focus" ability and +1 Initiative.

Wraith (Wraithseer only).name: Deliverance
Wraith (Wraithseer only).effect: The target unit regains 1 lost wound. Dead models may be revived. Living models have to be healed completely first.

Wraith (Wraithseer only).name: Foreboding
Wraith (Wraithseer only).effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S:5 AP:-1 D:1, Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.
